description: CompositionKhakhi green trousers made of 100% cotton, has a flat front, two pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back with buttoned closures, looped waist, appliqued brand tab over the right hip pocket, and a button and zipper closureFittingMid-low rise; Straight legWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsDesigned to be worn as casual wear with t-shirts, jackets and accessories, these trousers from basics are made of cotton fabric to offer a flawless casual silhouette.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers of length 40 cmHeight: 6.2', Waist: 32"
